title: Content Hardcore
description: The official modpack for the Content Hardcore SMP a lightweight vanilla-plus experience optimized for hardcore multiplayer and smooth singleplayer gameplay.
body:
Content Hardcore is the official modpack of the Content Hardcore SMP, a community-driven hardcore multiplayer server.  
This pack is designed to keep the vanilla vibe intact, but with better performance, sharper visuals, and useful quality-of-life upgrades.

Whether you're playing on the official server or running a solo hardcore world, this modpack makes the experience smoother, more stable, and just a bit nicer without changing the core game.

### Credits
This pack includes a VanillaTweaks resource pack.  
Original download: https://vanillatweaks.net/
